cards.back: Languages with limited annotated data, making it challenging to train machine learning models
A neural network architecture used for machine translation, where the encoder processes the input sequence and the decoder generates the output sequence
The process of using a pre-trained model as a starting point for training a new model on a different task or dataset
Training a single model on multiple tasks simultaneously, which can help improve performance on each task by leveraging the knowledge gained from the other tasks
Techniques used to artificially increase the size of a dataset by applying random transformations or modifications to the existing data
